crosswalk_note: Whole-farm event loss with NO confirmed MW denominator and NO struck-turbine count. Cannot be placed on the per-MW failure-unit DR axis. Farm-average $/MW would understate per-struck-turbine severity.
denominator_note: v2 recasts this row onto the 1,090 USD/kW ($1,090,000/MW) turbine-equipment atom (WT_TURBINE_EQUIPMENT_ASSEMBLY), evaluated with mutually-exclusive ordered damage states -- NOT the v1.0 five-unit independent-component sum on the 1,623,000 USD/MW physical base. Only per-turbine or per-struck-subsystem figures are grain-comparable to this atom; whole-farm $/MW is not.

crosswalk_note: Places an event on the speed-ratio x-axis (r = V_3s / Ve50); not a loss. Use with an explicit uncertainty band.
denominator_note: Places the event on a hazard x-axis. Under v2 this pair of pathways now uses TWO axes: straight_line_convective uses X_CONVECTIVE_ROTOR_EFFECTIVE_GUST_RATIO_TO_VE50 (dimensionless gust/Ve50 ratio); tornado_direct_hit uses X_TORNADO_ROTOR_EFFECTIVE_PEAK_HORIZONTAL_SPEED (m/s, absolute). An intensity anchor must be assigned to the correct pathway axis before use.

crosswalk_note: Qualitative failure-mode observation; maps to a failure unit but carries no dollar or DR value.
denominator_note: Qualitative failure-mode observation. Under v2 it would map to the single WT_TURBINE_EQUIPMENT_ASSEMBLY curve (DS1 pitch/control, DS2 rotor-assembly, or DS3 terminal state depending on severity) rather than to an independent v1.0 WT_BLADE_STRUCT-only bucket, because v2 states are mutually exclusive and ordered, not independently summed components.
